response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and relevant AI-agent infrastructure contributions (e.g., MCP code generators) but lacks direct evidence of GenAI production systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI). His expertise in Python/TypeScript is solid, but cloud platform depth (AWS/GCP/Azure) and LLM optimization metrics are not explicitly demonstrated. His leadership and technical depth are evident, but GenAI-specific experience is a gap.
strengths: 8+ years of full-stack development with TypeScript/Python and cloud-native tools (AWS CDK, Docker)
Active contribution to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP servers, frameworks for agentic workflows)
Strong technical leadership and mentorship demonstrated through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent system frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI)
Limited explicit mention of major cloud platform expertise (AWS/GCP/Azure) in GenAI contexts
Lacks demonstrated focus on LLM performance metrics, evaluation pipelines, or observability frameworks for AI systems

key_factors.factor: Cloud platform expertise for AI systems
